subject: [sender smoke test 1/2] Apps Script email sender
body:
This is smoke test 1 of 2 for the Apps Script email sender (Code.gs + CLI).

Replace both 'to' addresses in this file with your own address before submitting. If you received this email (with the default attachment, if you configured DEFAULT_ATTACHMENT_FILE_ID), then draft creation, attachment handling, and scheduled cloud-side sending all work end to end.

Nothing to do - this only went to yourself.

- the sender

subject: [sender smoke test 2/2] Apps Script email sender
body:
This is smoke test 2 of 2 for the Apps Script email sender (Code.gs + CLI), ideally sent to a second address you own on a different provider to confirm cross-provider delivery.

Replace both 'to' addresses in this file with your own addresses before submitting. If you received this email, scheduled cloud-side sending works end to end.

Nothing to do - this only went to yourself.

- the sender
